description: Etsy niche research whose scores come with their evidence attached — seeded search, honest confidence, and a local store that turns repeat research into trends.

tools.name: account_show
tools.description: Show the EverBee account's current plan, research quota, and usage. Use this to check remaining keyword-search quota before a batch run — the free Hobby plan allows only 10 keyword searches per month. Returns the account.

tools.name: keyword_research_list
tools.description: Browse EverBee's default keyword feed (what the UI shows before you search). This is a discovery/browse surface, NOT a search: it ignores any seed and returns EverBee's unranked default suggestions. To research a specific keyword use `keyword-research search --keyword`. Optional: type_of_search (default: keywords_suggestion), order_by (default: new_volume), order_direction (default: desc) (plus 1 more).

params.name: order_by
params.description: Sort field: new_volume, competition, or score.

tools.name: keyword_research_search
tools.description: Seeded keyword search. Returns keywords related to the seed with volume, competition, score, CPC, and trend, plus the seed's own demand-vs-competition metrics under `searched_keyword`. This is the endpoint the EverBee UI search box calls. Comma-join the keyword value to research multiple seeds at once. Required: keyword. Optional: type_of_search (default: keywords_suggestion), order_by (default: new_volume), order_direction (default: desc) (plus 2 more).

params.name: keyword
params.description: Seed keyword to research, e.g. 'dad shirt'. Comma-join multiple seeds: 'dad shirt,fishing dad shirt'.

params.name: type_of_search
params.description: EverBee keyword search mode. keywords_suggestion returns related-keyword suggestions for the seed.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Sort field: new_volume (search volume), competition, or score.

params.name: count_search
params.description: Count this search against the account's plan quota, matching EverBee UI behavior.

tools.name: products_list
tools.description: Browse EverBee's default product feed (what the UI shows before you search). This is a discovery/browse surface, NOT a search: it ignores any search term. To research a specific product niche use `products search --search-term`. Optional: order_by (default: est_mo_revenue), order_direction (default: desc), time_range (default: last_1_month) (plus 2 more). Returns the default_product_analytics.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Sort field: est_mo_revenue, est_mo_sales, price, or growth_rate.

tools.name: shops_resolve
tools.description: Resolve an Etsy shop handle to its EverBee identity (shop_id, exact shop name, rating, review count, year created). Use this before any shop workflow so an unresolved handle is reported as unresolved rather than as a shop with zero research evidence. Required: query. Returns array of shop_match.

params.name: query
params.description: Etsy shop handle to resolve, e.g. '3rdprintsDesign'. Returns near-matches when the exact handle does not exist.

tools.name: shops_search
tools.description: Search EverBee's Etsy shop database. Pass a search term to find a specific competitor shop, or omit it to browse top shops by revenue. Optional: search_term, order_by (default: revenue), order_direction (default: desc) (plus 2 more). Returns the shop.

params.name: search_term
params.description: Shop name to search for, e.g. '3rdprintsDesign'. Omit to browse the top-shop feed.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Sort field: revenue, revenue_30_days, listing_active_count, or review_count.
